hero.title: Plans, issues & RFIs — one source of truth for your team
hero.sub: Everyone works from the same drawings. Field issues and formal RFIs stay tied to the plan — not buried in email. Start free in your browser; upgrade when your team needs the cloud.
hero.subValueFirst: Cut coordination delays with one shared workflow for drawings, issues, and RFIs. Start free in-browser, then scale to cloud collaboration when your team is ready.

solutionsIntro.body: Field delivery and building operations share one workspace — drawings, issues, RFIs, and handover data stay linked instead of siloed in different apps.

constructionCard.label: Construction
constructionCard.title: Job site tools for every team
constructionCard.body: Plans, issues, RFIs, and takeoff — aligned with how supers and PMs actually work.
constructionCard.extra: Cloud storage, PDF revisions, schedule, audits, proposals

operationsCard.label: Operations & FM
operationsCard.title: Building operations from day one
operationsCard.body: Handover, assets, maintenance, and dashboards — structured for facilities teams, not generic tickets.

howItWorks.title: From PDF to project clarity
howItWorks.description: Start alone on Free, then invite your team to Pro when drawings, issues, and RFIs need to live in one place.
howItWorks.step1Body: Open PDFs in the free viewer instantly, or upload to Pro when your whole team needs one shared set of sheets.
howItWorks.step2Body: Calibrate scale, take measurements, and annotate — the same precision whether you are in the trailer or at your desk.
howItWorks.step3Body: Drop issues on the drawing, run RFIs with a real workflow, and keep everyone looking at the same revision.
howItWorks.step4Body: Track status from field to answer, export takeoffs and marked sheets, and walk the job with confidence.

pricing.title: Free to start. Pro or Enterprise when you're ready.
pricing.subtitle: View and mark up PDFs for free — add Pro for team collaboration, or Enterprise for Operations & Maintenance on top.
pricing.footnote: Seat counts follow internal (non-external) members and pending invites. Extra-seat billing is applied when you exceed {seats} — see billing after checkout.

pwa.title: Add PlanSync to your device
pwa.subtitle: Install or add to home screen, sign in, then turn on alerts — all in a few steps.
pwa.step1Heading: Install or add to home screen
pwa.step1Lead: Pick your device — use these hints so PlanSync opens like a normal app.
pwa.desktopBody: look for the install icon in the address bar, or the app menu → Install PlanSync.
pwa.iosBody: Share → Add to Home Screen, then open from the icon.
pwa.androidBody: menu → Install app or Add to Home screen.
pwa.installHint: If the install button doesn’t appear here, your browser may have already installed the app — use your browser’s menu instead.
pwa.step2Body: Open PlanSync from your new shortcut and sign in to your workspace. You need an account before you can enable push alerts.
pwa.step3Body: Go to Account (profile menu) → Alerts on this device and switch them on. When your browser asks, choose Allow so we can reach you with RFIs, issues, and other updates when you're not in the app.
pwa.notifChromeBody: if you blocked alerts earlier, use the lock or site icon in the address bar → Site settings → Notifications → Allow.
pwa.notifSafariBody: add PlanSync to the Home Screen first, then check iOS Settings → Notifications (or Apps) for PlanSync.
pwa.footer: PWA availability depends on your browser. The free viewer works in the tab without installing. Notifications need a signed-in workspace and a browser that supports web push.

finalCta.title: Start for free today
finalCta.body: Open the free viewer in seconds — no signup needed.
finalCta.bodyLine2: Upgrade to Pro when your team is ready.
finalCta.footnote1: Runs in the browser · optional PWA install

proofSection.title: Built for real construction and FM workflows
proofSection.body: PlanSync keeps drawing context, field updates, and formal workflows in one system, so teams move faster with less coordination overhead.

proof1.title: Traceable project records
proof1.body: Every issue, RFI, and response remains linked to exact drawing context for clearer accountability.

proof2.title: Faster handoffs
proof2.body: From bid to handover, teams work in one connected data flow instead of disconnected spreadsheets and inboxes.

proof3.title: Measurable impact
proof3.body: Role-based pages and proof modules focus visitors on outcomes that drive trial starts and pipeline quality.

landingSection.title: What PlanSync solves
landingSection.description: Whether you are checking one detail or coordinating an entire delivery workflow, PlanSync connects drawings, field updates, and formal coordination in one place.

useCasesPage.body: Pick the workflow closest to your team setup, then adapt the same rollout pattern in your own delivery model.

general-contractor-delivery.title: General contractor delivery workflow
general-contractor-delivery.body: Coordinate field teams, PMs, and office stakeholders on one live drawing set.

subcontractor-quantity-workflow.title: Subcontractor quantity workflow
subcontractor-quantity-workflow.body: Move from takeoff to proposal with fewer manual handoffs and cleaner revision control.

owner-handover-and-operations.title: Owner handover and operations launch
owner-handover-and-operations.body: Turn closeout data into operational assets without rebuilding records in another system.

facility-team-service-operations.title: Facilities service operations
facility-team-service-operations.body: Run recurring maintenance and service requests with traceable operational history.

general-contractor-delivery.summary: A delivery flow for GCs that keeps sheet revisions, field issues, and formal RFIs aligned in one workspace.
general-contractor-delivery.step1Body: Upload current revisions and align project teams to one approved sheet set.
general-contractor-delivery.step2Body: Drop field issues directly on drawings with owners, priority, and due dates.
general-contractor-delivery.step3Body: Convert unresolved issues into formal RFIs with an auditable response trail.
general-contractor-delivery.step4Body: Link actions to milestones so handoffs and closeout windows stay realistic.

subcontractor-quantity-workflow.summary: A bid-ready workflow for trades that reduces rework between takeoff, pricing, and proposal assembly.
subcontractor-quantity-workflow.step1Body: Use consistent scales and zone logic for repeatable quantity outputs.
subcontractor-quantity-workflow.step2Body: Aggregate measured items by trade package and scope segment.
subcontractor-quantity-workflow.step3Body: Generate polished proposal drafts directly from measured data.
subcontractor-quantity-workflow.step4Body: Track drawing updates and quantity deltas to keep bid assumptions defensible.

owner-handover-and-operations.summary: A handover model for owners that preserves closeout clarity and accelerates day-one operational readiness.
owner-handover-and-operations.step1Body: Organize as-builts, manuals, and warranties under asset-linked records.
owner-handover-and-operations.step2Body: Create searchable asset registers with location and service metadata.
owner-handover-and-operations.step3Body: Define recurring maintenance plans before transition to steady operations.
owner-handover-and-operations.step4Body: Validate condition and compliance workflows during the first service window.

facility-team-service-operations.summary: A service operations flow for FM teams balancing recurring maintenance with reactive requests.
facility-team-service-operations.step1Body: Route occupant requests into structured work orders with ownership and priority.
facility-team-service-operations.step2Body: Use templates to keep site checks consistent across buildings.
facility-team-service-operations.step3Body: Capture updates and closure evidence directly on each service task.
facility-team-service-operations.step4Body: Monitor backlog and asset health trends from a shared FM dashboard.

caseStudiesPage.title: How project teams used PlanSync to speed up delivery and reduce coordination drag
caseStudiesPage.body: These examples model rollout sequences and measurable outcomes you can use in your own implementation.

harbor-residential-fast-rfi-turnaround.title: Harbor Residential cut RFI turnaround by 43%
harbor-residential-fast-rfi-turnaround.summary: A GC replaced fragmented email approvals with drawing-linked issue and RFI workflows.
harbor-residential-fast-rfi-turnaround.metric2: 31% fewer unresolved field issues at weekly review

metro-mech-estimating-cycle-reduction.title: Metro Mechanical shortened estimating cycles by 35%
metro-mech-estimating-cycle-reduction.summary: A subcontractor unified takeoff outputs and proposal generation across revisions.

citytower-handover-to-fm.title: CityTower launched FM operations 6 weeks earlier
citytower-handover-to-fm.summary: An owner team moved from closeout packets to asset-linked operations workflows.
citytower-handover-to-fm.metric3: 39% faster first-response time for tenant requests

harbor-residential-fast-rfi-turnaround.overview: Harbor Residential standardized issue capture and RFI escalation in one shared drawing workflow.
harbor-residential-fast-rfi-turnaround.change1Body: All field and office teams aligned around one live revision source.
harbor-residential-fast-rfi-turnaround.change2Body: Teams reduced back-and-forth by assigning issues with precise sheet locations.
harbor-residential-fast-rfi-turnaround.change3Body: Open questions moved through a visible, accountable approval chain.

metro-mech-estimating-cycle-reduction.overview: Metro Mechanical connected takeoff data, revision control, and proposal output in one estimating flow.
metro-mech-estimating-cycle-reduction.change1Body: Estimators reused package templates instead of rebuilding worksheets each cycle.
metro-mech-estimating-cycle-reduction.change2Body: Drawing updates were tracked and reflected quickly in bid assumptions.
metro-mech-estimating-cycle-reduction.change3Body: Client-facing proposals were generated from aligned internal quantity data.

citytower-handover-to-fm.overview: CityTower built operational continuity from closeout by attaching records to maintainable assets.
citytower-handover-to-fm.change1Body: Manuals, warranties, and closeout records moved into searchable asset cards.
citytower-handover-to-fm.change2Body: Recurring service schedules were configured before occupancy ramped up.
citytower-handover-to-fm.change3Body: Occupants submitted structured requests with status visibility from day one.

footer.tagline: The construction drawing workspace for teams who can't afford to work off the wrong information.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Billing, storage, and how Free vs Pro works.

items.a: Yes. The local PDF viewer is free forever. No hidden limits, no expiry, no credit card.

items.q: Where are my files stored on Free?
items.a: Free files never leave your browser. Everything stays on your device locally. We never see or upload your PDFs.
Pro files are stored securely on AWS S3 in your account. Only your team can access them. All transfers are encrypted.
Yes. Cancel anytime from your billing settings. No questions asked, no lock-in.

items.q: What happens to my data if I cancel?
items.a: You keep access until the end of your billing period. Export your data anytime before cancelling.
Full Pro access for 14 days, no credit card needed. Upgrade anytime during or after the trial.

items.q: Can I upgrade from Free to Pro?
items.a: Yes. Your local markups and measurements migrate automatically to the cloud when you upgrade.
Currently PDF only. DXF/DWG support is on our roadmap and coming soon.

chatbot.title: PlanSync Assistant
chatbot.subtitle: Live product guidance
chatbot.placeholder: Ask about pricing, viewer, or team plans...
chatbot.welcome: Hi! I can help you pick the right PlanSync setup in under a minute. What would you like to know?
chatbot.quickPromptViewer: What can I do in the free viewer?
chatbot.quickPromptTrial: How does the Pro trial work?
chatbot.quickPromptOperations: Do you support operations and maintenance teams?
chatbot.replyPricing: You can start on Free at no cost. Pro adds team workflows with a 14-day trial, and Enterprise adds operations and maintenance modules.
chatbot.replyViewer: The free viewer lets you open PDFs in-browser, calibrate scale, measure, annotate, and export marked sheets without sign-up.
chatbot.replyTrial: Pro includes a 14-day trial so your team can test cloud collaboration, issues, RFIs, and project workflows before subscribing.
chatbot.replyOperations: Yes. Enterprise includes handover, assets, maintenance scheduling, inspections, work orders, and tenant portal workflows.
chatbot.replyFallback: I can help with pricing, free viewer features, Pro trial, or operations workflows. Pick a quick option below or ask in your own words.
chatbot.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
chatbot.errorUnavailable: The assistant is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
chatbot.errorRateLimit: Too many messages. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
